parameters.name: TRAIN_TARGET
parameters.helpGroovy: "Choose which segmentation target to train. BOTH runs nucleus and whole-cell training sequentially with separate target-specific model IDs and evidence."

parameters.name: TRAINING_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Select the locked epoch/checkpoint preset. TEST is for diagnostic pipeline checks only; FAST through ULTRA produce promoted models when a promoted model ID is supplied."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact image channel names used to train the nucleus target. Change only to match project channel names or an explicitly documented training design."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact image channel names used to train the whole-cell target, in Cellpose channel order. Keep this auditable because channel order changes the trained model."

parameters.name: NUC_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum nucleus mask equivalent diameter in microns for Cellpose train/validation execution. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using the training run's calibrated working pixel size."

parameters.name: CELL_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum whole-cell mask equivalent diameter in microns for Cellpose train/validation execution. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using the training run's calibrated working pixel size."

parameters.name: USE_BATCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables ASTRA's batch-oriented Cellpose training runtime behavior. Leave enabled for normal training unless diagnosing runtime behavior."

parameters.name: USE_PIXEL_SCALING
parameters.helpGroovy: "Uses image calibration when staging training inputs for the configured runtime. Disable only for controlled diagnostics because it changes how training images are scaled."

parameters.name: SHOW_GUI_NOTIFICATIONS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Show QuPath notifications for fatal errors, warnings, and successful completion. Disable only for scripted batch diagnostics."

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Choose which project images contribute training data. CURRENT_IMAGE uses the open image; PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION uses the explicit selected-image list."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project image names used when IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION. The launcher writes this audited list in project display-name order."

parameters.name: MATCH_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "When IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION, match names against original imported image names rather than QuPath display names."

parameters.name: MODE_LADDER
parameters.defaultGroovy:
[
    TEST    : [epochs: 1, save_every: 1],
    FAST    : [epochs: 50, save_every: 10],
    BALANCED: [epochs: 100, save_every: 5],
    FULL    : [epochs: 200, save_every: 2],
    ULTRA   : [epochs: 500, save_every: 1],
]
parameters.helpGroovy: "Locked training preset table. Edit only for an intentional protocol change because epoch count and checkpoint cadence affect model auditability."

parameters.name: LEARNING_RATE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose training learning rate shared across presets. Changing it creates a different training protocol and should be recorded in run provenance."

parameters.name: WEIGHT_DECAY
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose weight-decay value. Change only for a deliberate training protocol adjustment."

parameters.name: BATCH_SIZE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose training batch size. Increase only when the runtime environment has been validated for the larger memory load."

parameters.name: MIN_TRAIN_MASKS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum mask count required by the training export/launch path. Raising it tightens data sufficiency checks before Cellpose runs."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class name for nucleus ground-truth annotations. A mismatch fails training-region validation."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class name for whole-cell ground-truth annotations. A mismatch fails training-region validation."

parameters.name: REGION_CLASS_TRAINING
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class name for training regions. Only ground truth inside these regions contributes to training."

parameters.name: REGION_CLASS_VALIDATION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class name for validation regions. Non-TEST training requires usable validation regions for best-epoch selection."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus training initializer selector. MODEL_NAME uses a named Cellpose initializer, SAVED uses the promoted nucleus model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus Cellpose model name used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute nucleus model file path used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: NUC_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved nucleus model ID used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. ASTRA never chooses a saved model automatically at runtime."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell training initializer selector. MODEL_NAME uses a named Cellpose initializer, SAVED uses the promoted cell model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell Cellpose model name used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute whole-cell model file path used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: CELL_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved cell model ID used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. ASTRA never chooses a saved model automatically at runtime."

parameters.name: CELLPOSE_FORK_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Required marker checked during runtime preflight to confirm the configured Cellpose installation appears to be the ASTRA fork."

parameters.name: PRINT_VERDICT_BLOCK
parameters.helpGroovy: "Print the final evidence/verdict recap. Leave enabled for reviewable training logs."

parameters.name: EXPORT_LOSS_CURVES_CSV
parameters.helpGroovy: "Retired. Leave false. Training loss curves are written only as promoted-model evidence after non-TEST promotion."

parameters.name: EXPORT_SUMMARY_JSON
parameters.helpGroovy: "Retired. Leave false. Training summaries are written only as promoted-model evidence after non-TEST promotion."

parameters.name: OVERLAP_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Pixel overlap for Cellpose tiling during training/runtime staging. Change only for a documented tiling protocol adjustment."

parameters.name: NTHREADS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Worker thread count requested from the Cellpose runtime. Lower this for constrained machines or shared workstations."

parameters.name: READ_RESULTS_ASYNC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Read Cellpose results asynchronously through the extension runtime. Disable only while diagnosing runtime synchronization issues."

parameters.name: NUC_PROMOTED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit promoted nucleus model ID written under astra/models/nucleus/<model_id>. Required outside TEST mode for nucleus training."

parameters.name: CELL_PROMOTED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit promoted whole-cell model ID written under astra/models/cell/<model_id>. Required outside TEST mode for cell training."

parameters.name: DEBUG
parameters.helpGroovy: "Print additional training control-flow diagnostics."

parameters.name: DEBUG_IO
parameters.helpGroovy: "Print additional filesystem and artifact path diagnostics."

parameters.name: DEBUG_SCORE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Print additional training score/evidence diagnostics."

parameters.name: DEBUG_CP
parameters.helpGroovy: "Print additional Cellpose command/runtime diagnostics."

parameters.name: TUNE_TARGET
parameters.helpGroovy: "Selects which biological target is tuned. NUCLEUS and CELL tune one target-specific model/parameter contract; BOTH runs the same audited workflow separately for each target."

parameters.name: SEARCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls tuning intensity. TEST exercises runability only and writes no durable tuning CSV, QC figure, or best_params.json; FAST/BALANCED/FULL/ULTRA perform increasingly broad deterministic searches."

parameters.name: SEARCH_STYLE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls whether selected tiers are optimized together or one stage at a time. STAGED is easier to audit; JOINT explores interactions between knobs."

parameters.name: TIERS_TO_RUN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Ordered tuning tiers to evaluate. Tier choices define which Cellpose/SAM knobs can change and are recorded in tuning outputs for reproducibility."

parameters.name: SCORE_METRIC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Primary objective used to rank candidate parameters. DICE_PQ penalizes false positives/negatives, DICE is legacy overlap-only behavior, and IOU_PQ uses IoU-based matching."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Ordered image channels passed to Cellpose for nucleus tuning. Names must exactly match the QuPath image channel labels."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Ordered image channels passed to Cellpose for whole-cell tuning. Include only channels intended to inform the cell detector."

parameters.name: USE_BATCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Runs each tuning parameter set through ASTRA's batch-oriented Cellpose path across eligible images. Leave enabled for normal tuning unless diagnosing runtime behavior."

parameters.name: USE_PIXEL_SCALING
parameters.helpGroovy: "Uses image calibration when staging tuning inputs for the configured runtime. Disable only for controlled diagnostics because it changes detector input scale."

parameters.name: SHOW_GUI_NOTIFICATIONS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Shows QuPath notifications for fatal tuning errors, replacement decisions, and completion. Console logs remain the detailed audit trail."

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Selects which project images contribute validation regions to tuning. CURRENT_IMAGE uses the open image; PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION uses the explicit selected-image list."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project image names used when IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION. The launcher writes this audited list in project display-name order."

parameters.name: MATCH_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "When IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION, matches against original imported names instead of QuPath display names."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "QuPath annotation class containing nucleus ground truth. The class name must match exactly or tuning fails before search."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "QuPath annotation class containing whole-cell ground truth. The class name must match exactly or tuning fails before search."

parameters.name: REGION_CLASS_VALIDATION
parameters.helpGroovy: "QuPath annotation class marking validation regions used for tuning. Each region must contain target-specific ground truth."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus model selector. MODEL_NAME uses a Cellpose model name, SAVED uses the promoted nucleus model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus Cellpose model name used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute nucleus model file path used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: NUC_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved nucleus model ID used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. Runtime selection is deterministic and never picks newest, best, or only automatically."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell model selector. MODEL_NAME uses a Cellpose model name, SAVED uses the promoted cell model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell Cellpose model name used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute whole-cell model file path used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: CELL_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved cell model ID used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. Runtime selection is deterministic and never picks newest, best, or only automatically."

parameters.name: CELLPOSE_FORK_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Expected marker proving the configured runtime is the Cellpose-ASTRA fork. Changing it weakens runtime provenance checks."

parameters.name: ALLOW_PER_TARGET_OVERRIDES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables target-specific search, metric, and scoring overrides. Leave off unless nucleus and cell targets need different audited scoring rules."

parameters.name: ALLOW_PER_TARGET_TIERS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables target-specific tier lists. Leave off unless nucleus and cell targets intentionally tune different knob sets."

parameters.name: ASSIGN_METHOD_DEFAULT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Default assignment algorithm for matching predicted objects to ground truth during PQ-style scoring."

parameters.name: AUTO_OPT_MAX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum assignment matrix size where AUTO may use the optimal solver. Larger regions use the deterministic greedy matcher."

parameters.name: MATCH_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Default overlap threshold required for a prediction/ground-truth match. This directly changes TP/FP/FN counts."

parameters.name: FP_WEIGHT_DEFAULT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Default false-positive penalty weight for recognition quality in PQ-style scoring."

parameters.name: FN_WEIGHT_DEFAULT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Default false-negative penalty weight for recognition quality in PQ-style scoring."

parameters.name: ENABLE_PROGRESS_HEARTBEAT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Prints periodic evaluation counts during long searches so stalled runtimes are visible in the QuPath log."

parameters.name: PROGRESS_EVERY_EVALS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of candidate evaluations between progress heartbeat log messages."

parameters.name: TIERS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maps tier numbers to Cellpose/SAM knobs. The selected tier list defines the search surface recorded in tuning artifacts."

parameters.name: PARAM_DEFAULTS_BY_TARGET
parameters.defaultGroovy:
[
    NUCLEUS: [
        diameter_um: CellposeInferenceDefaults.DIAMETER_UM_AUTO,
        cellprob   : CellposeInferenceDefaults.CELLPROB_THRESHOLD,
        flow       : CellposeInferenceDefaults.FLOW_THRESHOLD,
        niter      : CellposeInferenceDefaults.NITER_AUTO,
        min_mask_equivalent_diameter_um: 1.0d,
        norm_pmin  : CellposeInferenceDefaults.SAM_NORM_PMIN,
        norm_pmax  : CellposeInferenceDefaults.SAM_NORM_PMAX,
        simplify_px: CellposeInferenceDefaults.SAM_SIMPLIFY_DISTANCE_PX
    ],
    CELL   : [
        diameter_um: CellposeInferenceDefaults.DIAMETER_UM_AUTO,
        cellprob   : CellposeInferenceDefaults.CELLPROB_THRESHOLD,
        flow       : CellposeInferenceDefaults.FLOW_THRESHOLD,
        niter      : CellposeInferenceDefaults.NITER_AUTO,
        min_mask_equivalent_diameter_um: 1.0d,
        norm_pmin  : CellposeInferenceDefaults.SAM_NORM_PMIN,

    ]
]

parameters.name: INJECT_DEFAULTS_FOR_UNTUNED_KNOBS
parameters.helpGroovy: "When true, explicitly applies the pinned upstream Cellpose defaults above for knobs outside the active tuning tier. Disable only when intentionally testing raw runtime-default behavior."

parameters.name: PRINT_PARAM_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls whether the final log prints all parameters with tuned/default tags or only actively tuned parameters."

        niter      : [min: 200, max: 2000],   // int

parameters.name: DEBUG
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables additional tuning orchestration diagnostics in the log."

parameters.name: DEBUG_IO
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables filesystem and artifact path diagnostics for tuning."

parameters.name: DEBUG_SCORE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables scoring diagnostics for assignment, TP/FP/FN, and metric calculations."

parameters.name: DEBUG_CP
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables Cellpose runtime diagnostics during tuning inference."

parameters.name: USE_GPU
parameters.helpGroovy: "Requests GPU acceleration for Cellpose tuning runs. Disable only when the configured runtime/GPU is unavailable; this affects execution performance, not scoring rules."

parameters.name: CONSTRAIN_TO_PARENT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Constrains detections to validation-region parent objects so tuning scores the intended annotated regions."

parameters.name: CLEAR_DETECTIONS_BEFORE_EVAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy compatibility flag retained for schema stability. Tuning now fails if pre-existing detections are present instead of clearing unrelated objects."

parameters.name: CLEAR_DETECTIONS_AFTER_EVAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy compatibility flag retained for schema stability. Temporary ASTRA tuning detections are always cleaned after each evaluation."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_TEST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in TEST mode; TEST is for runability only and writes no durable tuning artifacts."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_FAST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in FAST mode. Use zero only when intentionally evaluating all eligible validation regions."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_BALANCED
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in BALANCED mode; zero means all eligible validation regions."

parameters.name: FAST_RANDOM_TRIALS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of deterministic random candidates evaluated in FAST mode."

parameters.name: BALANCED_RANDOM_TRIALS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of deterministic random-screen candidates evaluated before BALANCED zoom passes."

parameters.name: BALANCED_ZOOM_PASSES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of local refinement passes around the current best BALANCED candidate."

parameters.name: BALANCED_ZOOM_TRIALS_PER_CANDIDATE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of deterministic candidates sampled in each BALANCED zoom pass."

parameters.name: BALANCED_ZOOM_RADIUS_FRACTION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Fraction of the current search range retained around the best candidate during BALANCED zoom refinement."

parameters.name: RANDOM_STEP_BY_TARGET
parameters.helpGroovy: "Per-mode, per-target quantization steps used to make random-search candidates reproducible and auditably bounded."

                norm_pmax  : 0.25d,
                simplify_px: 0.05d

                niter      : 25.0d,
                norm_pmin  : 0.25d,
                norm_pmax  : 0.25d,
                simplify_px: 0.05d
            ]
        ]
    ],

    ULTRA: [
        GLOBAL_POINTS_PER_PARAM: 7,
        LOCAL_POINTS_PER_PARAM : 13,

                norm_pmin  : 0.10d,

                simplify_px: 0.02d
            ],
            CELL   : [

                norm_pmin  : 0.10d,
                norm_pmax  : 0.10d,
                simplify_px: 0.02d
            ]
        ]
    ]
]
parameters.helpGroovy: "Deterministic grid-search controls for FULL and ULTRA modes, including pass counts, shrink behavior, and target step thresholds."

parameters.name: VALIDATE_TARGET
parameters.helpGroovy: "Selects which object type is validated. NUCLEUS and CELL validate one target; BOTH validates both targets with their own model and parameter settings."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls validation intensity. TEST exercises runability only and writes no durable validation CSV, summary JSON, or QC output; FAST/BALANCED/FULL/ULTRA evaluate increasingly broad deterministic validation sets."

parameters.name: SCORE_METRIC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Primary validation metric. DICE_PQ and IOU_PQ penalize false positives/false negatives through panoptic-quality scoring; DICE reports mean best overlap without an explicit false-positive penalty."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Image channels passed to Cellpose for nucleus validation. Names must match the project image channels exactly and should include only segmentation-relevant channels."

parameters.name: CHANNELS_FOR_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Image channels passed to Cellpose for whole-cell validation. Names must match the project image channels exactly and should include only cell-boundary or morphology-relevant channels."

parameters.name: USE_BATCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Runs validation detections through ASTRA's batch-oriented Cellpose path for the selected parameter set. Leave enabled for normal validation unless diagnosing runtime behavior."

parameters.name: USE_PIXEL_SCALING
parameters.helpGroovy: "Uses image calibration when staging validation inputs for the configured runtime. Disable only for controlled diagnostics because it changes detector input scale."

parameters.name: SHOW_GUI_NOTIFICATIONS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Shows QuPath notifications for validation failure and completion. Disabling this affects only GUI messaging; fatal errors still throw and appear in the run log."

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls which project images contribute validation regions. CURRENT_IMAGE uses the open image; PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION uses the explicit selected-image list."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project image names used when IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION. The launcher writes this audited list in project display-name order."

parameters.name: MATCH_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "When IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION, matches SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES against original imported image names instead of QuPath display names. Use only when project entries were renamed."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_NUCLEUS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class for nucleus ground-truth annotations. These objects define the reference masks for nucleus validation scoring."

parameters.name: GT_CLASS_CELL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class for whole-cell ground-truth annotations. These objects define the reference masks for cell validation scoring."

parameters.name: REGION_CLASS_VALIDATION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class for validation-region annotations. Validation only scores ground truth and predictions inside these regions."

parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus model selector. MODEL_NAME uses a Cellpose model name, SAVED uses the promoted nucleus model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus Cellpose model name used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute nucleus model file path used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: NUC_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved nucleus model ID used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. Runtime selection is deterministic and never picks newest, best, or only automatically."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell model selector. MODEL_NAME uses a Cellpose model name, SAVED uses the promoted cell model, and FILE uses an explicit model file."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell Cellpose model name used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: CELL_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute whole-cell model file path used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: CELL_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Explicit saved cell model ID used when CELL_MODEL_SOURCE is SAVED. Runtime selection is deterministic and never picks newest, best, or only automatically."

parameters.name: CELL_BEST_PARAMS_FILE

                                                cellprob   : CellposeInferenceDefaults.CELLPROB_THRESHOLD,
                                                flow       : CellposeInferenceDefaults.FLOW_THRESHOLD,
                                                niter      : CellposeInferenceDefaults.NITER_AUTO,
                                                min_mask_equivalent_diameter_um: 1.0d,
                                                norm_pmin  : CellposeInferenceDefaults.SAM_NORM_PMIN,

parameters.helpGroovy: "Pinned per-target defaults used when best_params.json omits an untuned Cellpose knob. Diameter 0.0 and niter 0 omit explicit builder values, while min_mask_equivalent_diameter_um is converted to Cellpose --min_size from each image calibration."

parameters.name: INJECT_DEFAULTS_FOR_UNTUNED_KNOBS
parameters.helpGroovy: "When true, explicitly applies the pinned upstream Cellpose defaults above for knobs omitted by tuning output. Disable only when intentionally testing raw runtime-default behavior."

parameters.name: PRINT_PARAM_MODE

parameters.name: DEBUG

parameters.name: DEBUG_IO

parameters.name: DEBUG_SCORE

parameters.name: DEBUG_CP

parameters.name: USE_GPU

parameters.name: CONSTRAIN_TO_PARENT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Constrains prediction ROIs to their parent validation region before scoring, preventing detections outside the audited region from affecting metrics."

parameters.name: CLEAR_DETECTIONS_BEFORE_EVAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Retains ASTRA's internal pre-evaluation cleanup switch. Validation refuses to run when pre-existing detections are present; remove or archive unrelated detections before validation."

parameters.name: CLEAR_DETECTIONS_AFTER_EVAL

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_TEST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in TEST mode; TEST is for runability only and writes no durable validation artifacts."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_FAST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in FAST mode. FAST remains deterministic and is intended for quick iteration rather than final reporting."

parameters.name: VALIDATION_SUBSET_CAP_BALANCED
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum validation regions used in BALANCED mode; zero means all eligible regions are evaluated."

parameters.name: MODES_TO_RUN

Treat generated classifiers as candidates requiring biological review. Routine publication runs normally use GENERATE_REGIONS, DETECT_CELLS, then QUANTIFY. Export and reset are separate validated script actions."

parameters.name: USE_BATCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Enables ASTRA's batch-oriented Cellpose runtime behavior for project-scale vascular runs. Leave enabled for normal analysis unless diagnosing runtime behavior."

parameters.name: USE_PIXEL_SCALING

parameters.name: FOCUS_VIEWER_ON_IMAGE

parameters.name: FOCUS_VIEWER_ON_ROI

parameters.name: VIEWER_FOCUS_PADDING

parameters.name: VIEWER_FOCUS_MIN_VIEW_SIZE_PX

parameters.name: LOG_VIEWER_PROGRESS_FAILURES

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls which project images or vessel ROIs are analyzed. CURRENT_IMAGE uses the open image, SELECTED_ANALYSIS_REGION uses the currently selected annotation whose class matches CLASS_ROI, and PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION uses the explicit selected-image list."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES

parameters.name: EXPORT_DIAGNOSTIC_COLUMNS

parameters.name: USE_NUCLEI
parameters.helpGroovy: "Runs nucleus detection and assigns nucleus ROIs to vascular cell objects. Disable only for a deliberate no-nucleus diagnostic workflow."

parameters.name: NUC_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus diameter in microns for Cellpose. The default 0.0 leaves diameter unspecified, matching upstream Cellpose auto-diameter behavior; set a positive value only after validating nucleus mask scale."

parameters.name: NUC_CELLPROB
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus cellprob threshold. The default 0.0 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; increasing it makes detection stricter and can remove weak nuclei before vascular measurements."

parameters.name: NUC_FLOW
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus flow threshold. The default 0.4 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; changing it alters which nucleus masks are accepted."

parameters.name: NUC_NITER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus iteration count. The default 0 omits the explicit niter parameter so Cellpose uses its automatic/proportional runtime behavior; positive values force a fixed iteration count."

parameters.name: NUC_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum nucleus mask equivalent diameter in microns. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using each image calibration; the 1.0 um default removes non-measurable debris/slivers without acting as a biological classifier."

parameters.name: CELL_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell diameter in microns for Cellpose. The default 0.0 leaves diameter unspecified, matching upstream Cellpose auto-diameter behavior; set a positive value only after validating cell mask scale."

parameters.name: CELL_CELLPROB
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell cellprob threshold. The default 0.0 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; increasing it makes detection stricter and can remove weak cell masks before vascular quantification."

parameters.name: CELL_FLOW
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell flow threshold. The default 0.4 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; changing it alters which cell masks are accepted."

parameters.name: CELL_NITER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell iteration count. The default 0 omits the explicit niter parameter so Cellpose uses its automatic/proportional runtime behavior; positive values force a fixed iteration count."

parameters.name: CELL_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum whole-cell mask equivalent diameter in microns. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using each image calibration; the 1.0 um default removes non-measurable debris/slivers without acting as a biological classifier."

parameters.name: SAM_SIMPLIFY_DISTANCE_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Optional contour simplification distance in pixels after Cellpose-SAM detection. The default 0.0 disables simplification; increasing it can change mask geometry, hierarchy membership, and measurements."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Lower percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. The ASTRA default is 1.0; change only after image-intensity review because it affects detector input scaling and segmentation."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMAX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Upper percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. The ASTRA default is 99.0; change only after image-intensity review because it affects detector input scaling and segmentation."

parameters.name: SAM_NTHREADS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose-SAM thread count. Zero leaves runtime threading automatic; changing it affects performance, not vascular scoring logic."

parameters.name: SAM_READ_RESULTS_ASYNC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Reads Cellpose mask outputs while the process is still running. Leave disabled unless runtime profiling shows a benefit; it affects execution behavior, not vascular scoring rules."

parameters.name: MULTINUCLEATED_CELL_POLICY
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls how candidate cells containing multiple assigned nuclei are handled. EXCLUDE omits them from ordinary vascular quantification while recording rare-event counts; INCLUDE_AS_REGULAR treats them as ordinary cells; INCLUDE_AND_LABEL includes them with a distinct multinucleated class label."

parameters.name: EXCLUDE_CELLS_TOUCHING_IMAGE_EDGE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Excludes Cellpose-derived cells touching the image boundary before vascular quantification to avoid edge-truncated measurement artifacts."

parameters.name: WALL_MARKER_OVERLAP_COMPARTMENT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cell compartment used to test overlap with the smooth-muscle wall. Cytoplasm avoids counting nucleus-only overlap as wall marker support."

parameters.name: ENDOTHELIUM_MARKER_OVERLAP_COMPARTMENT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cell compartment used to test overlap with endothelium. Cell-level overlap is the default because endothelial contact can occur outside the nucleus."

parameters.name: MIN_SMOOTH_MUSCLE_OVERLAP_FRACTION

parameters.name: MIN_ENDOTHELIUM_OVERLAP_FRACTION

parameters.name: ALLOW_DOUBLE_POSITIVE_CELLS_AS_VSMC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Allows cells meeting both wall and endothelial overlap rules to remain vascular smooth-muscle candidates. Leave false for stricter publication-facing classification."

parameters.name: EXCLUDE_CELLS_WITH_NUCLEUS_OVERLAPPING_LUMEN

parameters.name: ENDOTHELIUM_BAND_RADIUS_MULTIPLIER

parameters.name: WALL_MIN_SUPPORTED_ANGLE_FRACTION

parameters.name: WALL_MIN_RADIAL_SUPPORT_DENSITY

parameters.name: WALL_OUTLIER_MAD_MULTIPLIER

parameters.name: USE_IGNORE_ZONES

parameters.helpGroovy: "When IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION, matches SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES against original imported image names instead of QuPath display names. Use only when project entries were renamed."

parameters.name: DETECTION_TARGET
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls which segmentation objects are produced before colocalization. Use NUCLEUS for nucleus-only measurements, CELL for whole-cell measurements without nuclei, and BOTH when Cell/Cytoplasm and Nucleus compartments must be evaluated together."

parameters.name: NUCLEUS_SEGMENTATION_CHANNELS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Image channels used only for nucleus segmentation. Change this when the nuclear marker is not the first image channel or when the nucleus detector should use multiple channels; these channels do not define colocalization positivity by themselves."

parameters.name: NUC_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus diameter in microns for Cellpose. The default 0.0 leaves diameter unspecified, matching upstream Cellpose auto-diameter behavior; set a positive value only after validating that nucleus masks are consistently over- or under-split."

parameters.name: NUC_CELLPROB
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus cellprob threshold. The default 0.0 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; increasing it makes detection stricter and can remove weak nucleus masks before measurement."

parameters.name: NUC_FLOW
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus flow threshold. The default 0.4 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; changing it alters which nucleus masks are accepted."

parameters.name: NUC_NITER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus iteration count. The default 0 omits the explicit niter parameter so Cellpose uses its automatic/proportional runtime behavior; positive values force a fixed iteration count."

parameters.name: NUC_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum nucleus mask equivalent diameter in microns. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using each image calibration; the 1.0 um default removes non-measurable debris/slivers without acting as a biological classifier."

parameters.name: CELL_SEGMENTATION_CHANNELS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Image channels used only for whole-cell segmentation. Change this to the membrane/cytoplasm channels that define cell boundaries; do not include nuclear channels unless they are intentionally part of the cell-boundary model."

parameters.name: CELL_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Whole-cell diameter in microns for Cellpose. The default 0.0 leaves diameter unspecified, matching upstream Cellpose auto-diameter behavior; set a positive value only after validating that cell masks are consistently too small or too large."

parameters.name: CELL_CELLPROB
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell cellprob threshold. The default 0.0 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; increasing it makes detection stricter and can remove weak cell masks before cell-level measurement."

parameters.name: CELL_FLOW
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell flow threshold. The default 0.4 matches upstream Cellpose inference behavior; changing it alters which cell masks are accepted."

parameters.name: CELL_NITER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose whole-cell iteration count. The default 0 omits the explicit niter parameter so Cellpose uses its automatic/proportional runtime behavior; positive values force a fixed iteration count."

parameters.name: CELL_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum whole-cell mask equivalent diameter in microns. ASTRA converts this biological floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size using each image calibration; the 1.0 um default removes non-measurable debris/slivers without acting as a biological classifier."

parameters.name: SAM_SIMPLIFY_DISTANCE_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Optional contour simplification distance in pixels after Cellpose-SAM detection. The default 0.0 disables simplification; increasing it can change mask geometry and downstream measurements."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Lower percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. The ASTRA default is 1.0; change only after image-intensity review because it affects detector input scaling and segmentation."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMAX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Upper percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. The ASTRA default is 99.0; change only after image-intensity review because it affects detector input scaling and segmentation."

parameters.name: SAM_NTHREADS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose-SAM thread count. Zero leaves runtime threading automatic; changing it affects performance, not marker positivity logic."

parameters.name: SAM_READ_RESULTS_ASYNC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Reads Cellpose mask outputs while the process is still running. Leave disabled unless runtime profiling shows a benefit; it affects execution behavior, not scoring rules."

parameters.name: EXCLUDE_CELLS_TOUCHING_IMAGE_EDGE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Removes detected cells touching the image boundary before quantification. Enable when edge-truncated cells would bias colocalization measurements."

parameters.name: INTENSITY_DOWNSAMPLE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Downsample used for intensity measurement. Increase only for speed after validating measurement stability because it affects threshold inputs."

parameters.name: COLOCALIZATION_CHECKS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Defines the marker combinations to score. Each check has an output label, one measurement compartment, channels that must all be positive, and optional excluded channels that use object/compartment presence instead of numeric thresholding."

parameters.name: ASSIGN_COLOCALIZATION_CLASSES
parameters.helpGroovy: "When true, quantified cells receive QuPath object classes from the configured colocalization calls for visual inspection. Measurements and exports are still written either way."

parameters.name: COLOCALIZATION_CLASS_PREFIX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Text prepended to positive colocalization classes. Keep a clear ASTRA prefix so generated visual classes are distinguishable from manual classes."

parameters.name: COLOCALIZATION_NEGATIVE_CLASS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Class assigned when the configured visual colocalization check is negative."

parameters.name: CLASSIFY_BY_FIRST_CHECK_ONLY
parameters.helpGroovy: "When multiple checks are configured, classify cells by the first check only. Disable only when you want deterministic composite classes from all configured checks."

parameters.name: INCLUDE_MARKER_PATTERN_IN_CLASS
parameters.helpGroovy: "When true, positive class names include the check label so visual classes identify the marker pattern used."

parameters.name: EXPRESSION_CLASSIFICATION_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Default PIXEL_LEVEL_SCORE learns expression boundaries from analysis-region pixels, scores within-cell pixel levels, and classifies cells from ordinal-score KDE valleys. LEGACY_BINARY keeps the historical cell-mean positive/negative path for compatibility."

parameters.name: DISPLAY_COLOCALIZATION_CHECK
parameters.helpGroovy: "Colocalization check label used for the QuPath visual PathClass in PIXEL_LEVEL_SCORE mode. Blank means the first configured check."

parameters.name: POSITIVITY_METHOD
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary method used only when EXPRESSION_CLASSIFICATION_MODE is LEGACY_BINARY. MEAN_INTENSITY compares compartment mean intensity; PIXEL_POSITIVE_FRACTION compares the fraction of compartment pixels above threshold."

parameters.name: PIXEL_POSITIVE_FRACTION_MIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary cutoff used only when EXPRESSION_CLASSIFICATION_MODE is LEGACY_BINARY and POSITIVITY_METHOD is PIXEL_POSITIVE_FRACTION."

parameters.name: THRESHOLD_POPULATION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary threshold population. PIXEL_LEVEL_SCORE always uses PIXEL_INTENSITY from analysis-region pixels regardless of this field."

parameters.name: THRESHOLD_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "THRESHOLD_MODE chooses the thresholding method for every non-excluded marker. Per-marker threshold methods are intentionally unsupported."

parameters.name: GMM_COMPONENTS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of Gaussian components used by GAUSSIAN_MIXTURE and LOG_GAUSSIAN_MIXTURE boundary inference."

parameters.name: OTSU_CLASS_COUNT
parameters.helpGroovy: "Number of ordinal classes used by AUTO_OTSU_PER_CHANNEL boundary inference."

parameters.name: THRESHOLD_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "THRESHOLD_SCOPE chooses the population scope used to resolve thresholds: IMAGE resolves per image, REGION resolves per parent analysis region, and SELECTED_IMAGES uses the explicit threshold-source image list."

parameters.name: THRESHOLD_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project image names used only when THRESHOLD_SCOPE is SELECTED_IMAGES. These images provide the threshold-source population and do not automatically run Cellpose unless they are also included by IMAGE_SCOPE."

parameters.name: MATCH_THRESHOLD_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "When THRESHOLD_SCOPE is SELECTED_IMAGES, matches THRESHOLD_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES against original imported image names instead of QuPath display names. Use only when project entries were renamed."

parameters.name: MANUAL_INTENSITY_BOUNDARIES_BY_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Manual ordered expression boundaries used when THRESHOLD_MODE is MANUAL. Keys match Channel|Compartment markers and values may be a number or ordered list of numbers."

parameters.name: MANUAL_INTENSITY_THRESHOLDS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary manual positivity thresholds used when THRESHOLD_MODE is MANUAL and no ordered manual boundary list is supplied."

parameters.name: RANGE_THRESHOLD_FRACTIONS_BY_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Ordered range-percent expression boundary fractions used when THRESHOLD_MODE is RANGE_PERCENT. Values may be a number or list of fractions between 0 and 1."

parameters.name: RANGE_THRESHOLD_FRACTION_BY_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary range-percent threshold fractions used when THRESHOLD_MODE is RANGE_PERCENT and no ordered fraction list is supplied."

parameters.name: THRESHOLD_PROVENANCE_BY_MARKER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Audit text required for manual thresholds. Describe the real threshold source before publication use; placeholders are rejected in MANUAL mode."

parameters.name: BACKGROUND_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Legacy binary background subtraction mode. PIXEL_LEVEL_SCORE requires NONE because regional pixels define the modeled signal/background space directly. In LEGACY_BINARY, LOCAL_PERCENTILE computes a data-derived intensity offset from the active threshold population."

parameters.name: LOCAL_BACKGROUND_PERCENTILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Percentile fraction used by LOCAL_PERCENTILE background correction. Example: 0.05 subtracts the fifth percentile of raw marker intensities from each marker in the active threshold population."

parameters.name: BACKGROUND_SUBTRACTION_BY_CHANNEL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Manual per-marker intensity offsets used only when BACKGROUND_MODE is MANUAL_OFFSET. Each Channel|Compartment value is subtracted from that marker's measured mean before thresholding and positivity calls; keys must match COLOCALIZATION_CHECKS."

parameters.name: EXPORT_QC_FIGURES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exports threshold QC figures for non-excluded markers. Disable only when plots are intentionally unnecessary; requested export failures are not hidden."

parameters.name: RESULTS_FOLDER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project-relative analysis results folder under projectRoot/astra/results. Colocalization defaults to astra/results/colocalization."

parameters.name: RESULTS_BASENAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Optional filename prefix for exported results. Leave blank to derive names from the slide/project entry; set for publication-specific naming."

parameters.name: FITC_RAW_THRESHOLD
parameters.helpGroovy: "Deprecated compatibility field. The publication one-shot path uses manual Smooth Muscle annotations by default; FITC is used only when the optional radial media inference mode is enabled."

parameters.name: FITC_OVERLAP_FRACTION_MIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Deprecated compatibility field. Per-nucleus wall/media inclusion is now controlled by MEDIA_OVERLAP_FRACTION_MIN."

parameters.name: AF647_RAW_THRESHOLD
parameters.helpGroovy: "Deprecated compatibility field. AF647 positivity is now called by the nuclear AF647 local-background hybrid classifier, not a global raw threshold."

parameters.name: AF647_POSITIVE_PIXEL_FRACTION_MIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Deprecated compatibility field. The active one-shot path uses diffuse and focal local-background AF647 arms with BH-FDR correction instead of one fixed positive-pixel fraction cutoff."

parameters.name: SMA_MEDIA_CHANNEL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Internal backend channel used for radial SMA media boundary inference. The live publication-rescue path uses FITC; fixture tests may override this to AF555 when validating against OME vessel images."

parameters.name: SKIP_FITC_MEDIA_MASK
parameters.helpGroovy: "Publication one-shot default. Bypass fragile FITC-based radial SMA media inference and use the manual analysis annotation, normally Smooth Muscle, as the wall/media compartment."

parameters.name: MEDIA_OVERLAP_FRACTION_MIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum fraction of nuclear pixels that must overlap the active Smooth Muscle/media annotation before AF647 scoring. The publication one-shot default is 0.90 to exclude likely endothelial/lumen-border nuclei while tolerating small edge spillover."

parameters.name: AF647_BACKGROUND_MIN_PIXELS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum non-nuclear AF647 background pixel count required for the local perinuclear background; when local support is lower, the tool uses non-nuclear pixels in the same Smooth Muscle/media annotation. If both are lower, the nucleus is rejected from AF647 scoring."

parameters.name: AF647_BACKGROUND_INNER_DIAMETER_FRACTION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Inner buffer radius for the perinuclear AF647 background annulus, expressed as a fraction of the median detected nucleus diameter in the region."

parameters.name: AF647_BACKGROUND_OUTER_DIAMETER_FRACTION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Outer buffer radius for the perinuclear AF647 background annulus, expressed as a fraction of the median detected nucleus diameter in the region."

parameters.name: AF647_BACKGROUND_MIN_WIDTH_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum full-resolution pixel width of the perinuclear AF647 background annulus."

parameters.name: AF647_DIFFUSE_BACKGROUND_QUANTILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Background quantile used by the diffuse nuclear AF647 arm. Nuclear pixels above this local/background P95 threshold are evaluated by a one-sided binomial tail test."

parameters.name: AF647_DIFFUSE_NULL_TAIL_PROBABILITY
parameters.helpGroovy: "Null exceedance probability for the diffuse AF647 arm, matching the P95 background threshold."

parameters.name: AF647_DIFFUSE_MIN_ENRICHED_PIXELS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum number of nuclear pixels above the diffuse AF647 threshold required after BH-FDR significance is met."

parameters.name: AF647_DIFFUSE_MIN_ENRICHED_FRACTION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum fraction of nuclear pixels above the diffuse AF647 threshold required after BH-FDR significance is met."

parameters.name: AF647_FOCAL_BACKGROUND_QUANTILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Background quantile used by the focal nuclear AF647 arm. This stricter P99 threshold captures small bright nuclear puncta without accepting single-pixel artifacts."

parameters.name: AF647_FOCAL_NULL_TAIL_PROBABILITY
parameters.helpGroovy: "Null exceedance probability for the focal AF647 arm, matching the P99 background threshold."

parameters.name: AF647_FOCAL_MIN_ENRICHED_PIXELS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum number of nuclear pixels above the focal AF647 threshold required after BH-FDR significance is met."

parameters.name: AF647_FOCAL_MIN_ENRICHED_FRACTION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum fraction of nuclear pixels above the focal AF647 threshold required after BH-FDR significance is met."

parameters.name: AF647_FDR_Q_THRESHOLD
parameters.helpGroovy: "Benjamini-Hochberg adjusted q-value cutoff used independently by the diffuse and focal AF647 arms within each analysis ROI."

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls which project image entries are processed by the one-shot tool. Current Image processes the open viewer image, Selected Region processes only the selected ROI annotation in the open viewer image, and Project Image Selection processes the named project entries chosen in the launcher."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact project image names to process when Image Scope is Project Image Selection. Use the launcher image selector to add one, many, or all project images."

parameters.name: MATCH_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "When enabled, selected project image names are matched against the original imported image name rather than the current QuPath project display name."

parameters.name: CLASS_ANALYSIS_REGION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath annotation class used as the parent wall/media ROI for one-shot analysis. The publication one-shot default expects manually drawn Smooth Muscle annotations."

parameters.name: CLEAR_EXISTING_ONESHOT_OBJECTS_FIRST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Removes previously generated one-shot nucleus cell objects before rerunning so repeated runs do not duplicate cells."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus Cellpose model source. MODEL_NAME uses a named Cellpose model such as cpsam; FILE uses one explicit model file path."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus Cellpose model name used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is MODEL_NAME."

parameters.name: NUC_MODEL_FILE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Absolute nucleus model file path used when NUC_MODEL_SOURCE is FILE."

parameters.name: NUC_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Nucleus diameter in microns for Cellpose. The default 0.0 leaves diameter unspecified so Cellpose uses its own runtime behavior."

parameters.name: NUC_CELLPROB
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus cellprob threshold. Increasing it makes nucleus detection stricter."

parameters.name: NUC_FLOW
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus flow threshold. Changing it alters which nucleus masks are accepted."

parameters.name: NUC_NITER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose nucleus iteration count. The default 0 omits the explicit niter parameter."

parameters.name: NUC_MIN_MASK_EQUIVALENT_DIAMETER_UM
parameters.helpGroovy: "Minimum nucleus mask equivalent diameter in microns. ASTRA converts this floor to Cellpose's pixel-area --min_size for each image calibration."

parameters.name: TILE_SIZE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose tile size in pixels used during nucleus detection."

parameters.name: USE_GPU
parameters.helpGroovy: "Runs Cellpose with GPU acceleration when the configured ASTRA runtime supports it. Disable only when CPU execution is intentional."

parameters.name: SAM_SIMPLIFY_DISTANCE_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Optional contour simplification distance in pixels after Cellpose-SAM detection. The default 0.0 disables simplification."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMIN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Lower percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. This affects detector input scaling, not raw FITC/AF647 measurement thresholds."

parameters.name: SAM_NORM_PMAX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Upper percentile for Cellpose-SAM image normalization. This affects detector input scaling, not raw FITC/AF647 measurement thresholds."

parameters.name: SAM_NTHREADS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Cellpose-SAM thread count. Zero leaves runtime threading automatic."

parameters.name: SAM_READ_RESULTS_ASYNC
parameters.helpGroovy: "Reads Cellpose mask outputs while the process is still running. Leave disabled unless runtime profiling shows a benefit."

parameters.name: INTENSITY_DOWNSAMPLE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Downsample used for nucleus/media overlap and AF647 local-background measurements. Keep 1.0 for the publication one-shot unless speed is more important than exact pixel sampling."

parameters.name: EXPORT_TECHNICAL_CSV
parameters.helpGroovy: "Writes the publication one-shot technical CSV with Smooth Muscle overlap, AF647 background source, diffuse/focal thresholds, p-values, q-values, call reason, and final binary call."

parameters.name: RESULTS_FOLDER
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project-relative results folder under projectRoot/astra/results for the one-shot CSV files."

parameters.name: RESULTS_BASENAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Optional filename prefix for exported one-shot results. Leave blank to use sma_af647_oneshot."

parameters.name: NUC_PARAM_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Hidden one-shot setting: nucleus Cellpose parameters are read directly from this dialog."

parameters.name: NUC_SAVED_MODEL_ID
parameters.helpGroovy: "Hidden one-shot setting retained for shared Cellpose model-resolution compatibility."

parameters.name: USE_BATCH_MODE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Hidden one-shot setting: enables Cellpose batch inference for ROI tiles."

parameters.name: USE_PIXEL_SCALING
parameters.helpGroovy: "Hidden one-shot setting: keeps Cellpose pixel scaling enabled."

parameters.name: REGION_SOURCE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Chooses how output regions are created: copy existing source-class ROIs or generate deterministic random rectangles."

parameters.name: DISTRIBUTION_STRATEGY
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls how the requested total region count is distributed across eligible images."

parameters.name: IMAGE_SCOPE
parameters.helpGroovy: "Controls which project images receive generated regions. CURRENT_IMAGE uses the open image; PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION uses the explicit selected-image list."

parameters.name: SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES
parameters.helpGroovy: "Project image names used when IMAGE_SCOPE is PROJECT_IMAGE_SELECTION. The launcher writes this audited list in project display-name order."

parameters.name: TOTAL_REGIONS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact number of output region annotations to create. The script fails rather than saving a partial set."

parameters.name: OUTPUT_CLASS_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "QuPath class assigned to every generated or copied output region."

parameters.name: CLEAR_EXISTING_OUTPUT_CLASS_FIRST
parameters.helpGroovy: "Removes existing annotations with OUTPUT_CLASS_NAME before creating the new deterministic region set."

parameters.name: SOURCE_CLASS_NAME
parameters.helpGroovy: "Exact QuPath class copied in FROM_ROI mode."

parameters.name: COPY_OFFSET_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Signed pixel offset applied to copied ROIs; positive expands, negative shrinks, and zero copies exactly."

parameters.name: GENERATED_REGION_WIDTH_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Width in pixels for each random rectangle created in GENERATE mode."

parameters.name: GENERATED_REGION_HEIGHT_PX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Height in pixels for each random rectangle created in GENERATE mode."

parameters.name: MATCH_SELECTED_IMAGE_NAMES_AGAINST_ORIGINAL
parameters.helpGroovy: "Matches selected names against original imported image names instead of QuPath display names."

parameters.name: LOCK_NEW_ANNOTATIONS
parameters.helpGroovy: "Locks newly-created output annotations to reduce accidental manual edits after deterministic generation."

parameters.name: GENERATED_MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_REGION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Maximum placement attempts for each generated rectangle before the run treats the placement as unsatisfied."

parameters.name: GENERATED_PERMIT_EROSION
parameters.helpGroovy: "Allows erosion of the available placement mask during random rectangle generation."

parameters.name: OUTPUT_NAME_PREFIX
parameters.helpGroovy: "Prefix used for deterministic names assigned to generated output annotations."

parameters.name: CLEAR_OUTPUT_KEEP_CHILDREN
parameters.helpGroovy: "Keeps child objects when clearing existing output annotations before generating the new region set."

parameters.name: DEBUG
parameters.helpGroovy: "Reserved diagnostic flag recorded in cfg for future region-generation troubleshooting."
